title: KubeJS Actually Additions
body:
This mod adds KubeJS integration to Actually Additions. Current features: - full support and builders for all recipe types - utility bindings for special recipe components like coffee effects or crushing outputs with chances - an event to add custom behavior to empowering recipes Keep in mind that Actually Additions is currently in beta and will regularly change recipe internals!
This might result in functionality breaking. Please report any issues you experience.
